headline: Net worth matters more than income when it comes to financial anxiety, survey finds
summary: A new survey finds financial anxiety declines more with higher net worth than with higher income.

raw.headline: Net worth matters more than income when it comes to financial anxiety, survey finds
raw.summary: A new survey finds financial anxiety declines more with higher net worth than with higher income.

headline: What level of long-term growth is priced in for payments companies?
summary: Investing.com -- Several payments and fintech stocks are pricing in long-term growth rates well below current consensus forecasts, according to a UBS analysis using its HOLT valuation framework.

raw.headline: What level of long-term growth is priced in for payments companies?
